requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — BSB / BEA / BPC Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——BSB / BEA / BPC项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——BSB / BEA / BPC項目證據

summary.en: Bhutan Standards Bureau (BSB) is the national standards body, while BEA regulates the electricity sector and BPC handles utility connection and distribution requirements. For EVSE, Bhutan-facing projects should expect IEC-aligned safety evidence, especially IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment. Safety review should cover protective earthing, RCD or residual DC detection strategy, insulation monitoring, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, cable temperature rise, enclosure IP rating, surge protection, installation instructions, and safe operation at high-altitude Himalayan sites.
summary.zh: 不丹标准局（BSB）是不丹国家标准机构，BEA监管电力行业，BPC负责公用事业接入和配电要求。对于EVSE，面向不丹的项目应预期需要IEC体系安全证据，尤其是传导充电通用要求IEC 61851-1和直流电动汽车供电设备IEC 61851-23。安全审查应覆盖保护接地、RCD或直流剩余电流检测策略、绝缘监测、过流及过温保护、适用时的急停、电缆温升、外壳IP等级、浪涌保护、安装说明，以及在喜马拉雅高海拔场址的安全运行。
summary.zht: 不丹標準局（BSB）是不丹國家標準機構，BEA監管電力行業，BPC負責公用事業接入和配電要求。對於EVSE，面向不丹的項目應預期需要IEC體系安全證據，尤其是傳導充電通用要求IEC 61851-1和直流電動汽車供電設備IEC 61851-23。安全審查應覆蓋保護接地、RCD或直流剩餘電流檢測策略、絕緣監測、過流及過溫保護、適用時的急停、電纜溫升、外殼IP等級、浪湧保護、安裝說明，以及在喜馬拉雅高海拔場址的安全運行。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
BSB-adopted standards, BEA electricity requirements, and BPC project specifications where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is useful as a China design reference, but it embeds China-specific connector and signalling assumptions. China domestic test reports do not by themselves demonstrate compliance with IEC 61851, IEC 62196, Bhutan project requirements, or high-altitude installation conditions.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930-2023直流通信要求配套。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作为中国设计参考，但其包含中国特定接口和信号假设。中国国内测试报告本身不能证明符合IEC 61851、IEC 62196、不丹项目要求或高海拔安装条件。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊要求配套。GB/T 18487.1-2023可作為中國設計參考，但其包含中國特定接口和信號假設。中國國內測試報告本身不能證明符合IEC 61851、IEC 62196、不丹項目要求或高海拔安裝條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports for the final Bhutan configuration, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, Type 2 / CCS2 safety and temperature-rise evidence, enclosure IP certificates, altitude derating calculations, surge-protection data, and installation manuals aligned with BPC site conditions. Any change from GB/T to IEC connectors, communication stack, cable length, enclosure, cellular modem, or cooling path can invalidate earlier safety evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、最终不丹配置的IEC安全认可报告、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、Type 2 / CCS2安全及温升证据、外壳IP证书、海拔降额计算、浪涌保护数据，以及符合BPC场址条件的安装手册。从GB/T改为IEC接口、通信栈、电缆长度、外壳、蜂窝通信模块或冷却路径的任何变化，都可能使早期安全证据失效。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、最終不丹配置的IEC安全認可報告、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、Type 2 / CCS2安全及溫升證據、外殼IP證書、海拔降額計算、浪湧保護數據，以及符合BPC場址條件的安裝手冊。從GB/T改為IEC接口、通訊棧、電纜長度、外殼、蜂窩通訊模組或冷卻路徑的任何變化，都可能使早期安全證據失效。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or project-specific where BSB-adopted standards, BEA requirements, BPC connection approval, tender documents, or project-owner specifications require IEC 61851 and related safety evidence; high-altitude derating should be treated as a project safety requirement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Bhutan without clause mapping and accepted test documentation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T 18487 evidence as a design input only. Bhutan-facing EVSE files should include IEC 61851 evidence, final-configuration connector safety reports, IP and surge-protection documentation, and explicit altitude derating review for Himalayan sites.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将中国GB/T 18487证据作为设计输入。面向不丹的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851证据、最终配置接口安全报告、IP和浪涌保护文件，以及针对喜马拉雅场址的明确海拔降额审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將中國GB/T 18487證據作為設計輸入。面向不丹的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851證據、最終配置接口安全報告、IP和浪湧保護文件，以及針對喜馬拉雅場址的明確海拔降額審查。
